mainEntity.name: What is the cost of monthly GST return filing in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly filing fees start from Rs 1,500/month for small businesses. Pricing depends on transaction volume, number of invoices, and states of registration. Contact us at +91-77000 89597 for a customised quote.

mainEntity.name: What happens if GST returns are filed late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Late filing attracts a fee of Rs 50/day (Rs 20/day for nil returns) capped at Rs 5,000 per return under Section 47. Additionally, interest at 18% per annum applies on outstanding tax under Section 50. Continuous non-filing for 6 months can lead to GST registration cancellation.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle GST return filing for multiple states from Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle multi-state GST compliance from our Mumbai office. Each state's returns are filed separately with state-specific reconciliation. Consolidated reporting is provided for management review.
